title: selinum plinii
intro: Selinum plinii, also known as Wild celery, is a plant species that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selinum plinii include relief from digestive issues, reduction of fever, and treatment of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Selinum plinii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile addition to natural remedies.
